note: FERRYMAN model-weight manifest (QC 2026-07-13 v2). The SEED zip ships THIS FILE, not the weights. bin/hydrate_weights.ps1 downloads each repo at runtime (HF API tree listing + curl, HF_HUB_DISABLE_XET=1) into <FERRYMAN_HOME>/models/<dest>, verifies sizes (and sha256 for LFS files with -Verify), then applies the `layout` junctions. ~53 GB total; nothing large travels in the zip. All repo ids verified against the HF API 2026-07-13.

repos.role: oracle — speaker-sim (cnceleb_resnet34.onnx); REQUIRED, sim gate is enforced (QC D-08)
lipsync (Head V body); layout junctions below wire it into vendor/MuseTalk/models
MuseTalk pose dependency (QC D-01: was unmanifested)
MuseTalk face-parse dependency (QC D-01: was unmanifested)
MuseTalk audio encoder (QC D-01: was unmanifested; flax/tf variants filtered out)

layout.note: QC D-01: MuseTalk resolves weights RELATIVE TO ITS VENDOR REPO (vendor/MuseTalk/models/...). These junctions (create with New-Item -ItemType Junction; no admin needed) wire the hydrated models/ tree into that layout. hydrate_weights.ps1 applies them automatically after download.

separate.note: llama.cpp + GGUFs + whisper.cpp for Heads A/I and dub ASR — see manifests/substrate.json + bin/fetch_substrate.ps1 (QC D-08).

separate.what: vendor repos (code, cloned at pinned commits)
separate.note: See manifests/vendor.json (machine-readable: url + commit + patch file per repo) — QC D-03. REPLICATE.md step 3 consumes it.
